# invalidate()

**Instance Method**

Requests that the extension terminate.

## Declaration

```swift
func invalidate() async throws
```

## Discussion

This calls [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactProviderExtension/invalidate()] on the extension.
